chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 1/8: Join a Basketball Game
scene: 你想加入陌生人的半场篮球。（对话链：运动）

turns.cn: 嘿，要打一局吗？我们缺一个人。
turns.en: Hey, want to run a game? We need one more.
Sure. What are we playing to?
Eleven, win by two.

turns.cn: 你打什么位置？我打后卫。
turns.en: What position do you play? I'm a guard.
I'm center. Come on, you check up.
Nice shot! Count me in for the next one too.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 2/8: Swim at the Pool
scene: 你去社区游泳池游泳。（对话链：运动）

turns.en: Please shower before getting in the pool.
Okay. How are the lanes divided?

turns.cn: 慢速靠右，中间中速，左边快游。
turns.en: Slow on the right, medium in the center, fast on the left.
Do the lockers need coins?

turns.cn: 二十五美分押金，前台能换。
turns.en: A quarter deposit. We can make change at the desk.
What time does the pool close?

turns.cn: 晚上九点，八点四十五停止入场。
turns.en: Nine PM. Last entry at eight forty-five.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 3/8: Book Tennis Court
scene: 你打电话预订网球场。（对话链：运动）

turns.cn: 市立体育馆，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: City rec center. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想订明天下午四点的网球场。
turns.en: I'd like to book a tennis court tomorrow at four PM.

turns.cn: 二号场空着，一小时十五块。
turns.en: Court two is open. Fifteen dollars per hour.
Can I rent rackets?
Five dollars a pair. Balls sold separately.
Okay, book two hours.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 4/8: Play Tennis
scene: 你和朋友在网球场打球。（对话链：运动）

turns.en: You serve, I'll receive.
Sure. Play to seven games?
Deal. Loser buys water.
Ha! Let's go.
Was that ball out?
On the line. Your point.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 5/8: Rent Bikes
scene: 打完球你去湖边租自行车骑行。（对话链：运动）

turns.cn: 想租两辆自行车，两小时。
turns.en: I'd like two bikes for two hours.

turns.cn: 十五块一小时一辆，头盔免费。
turns.en: Fifteen an hour each. Helmets are free.
Do you have child seats?
Yes, five extra.
Okay. Which lakeside route do you recommend?

turns.cn: 往北十英里平路，风景好。
turns.en: North ten miles, flat and scenic.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 6/8: Bike Trouble
scene: 骑行中轮胎没气，你向路人求助。（对话链：运动）

turns.cn: 不好意思，有打气筒吗？胎瘪了。
turns.en: Excuse me, do you have a pump? I have a flat.
I do. I'll help you inflate it.

turns.cn: 可能是扎了，能撑回租车点吗？
turns.en: Might be a puncture. Can I ride back to the rental shop?
Go slow. Two miles to the shop.
Thanks so much.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 7/8: Return Bikes
scene: 你回到租车点还车说明情况。（对话链：运动）

turns.cn: 这辆胎扎了，另一辆没事。
turns.en: This one got a flat. The other is fine.

turns.cn: 补胎十块，正常租金照算。
turns.en: Patch is ten dollars. Regular rental still applies.
Fine. Card, please.
How was the ride?
Great scenery. Just bad luck with the tire.

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

title: Chain 8/8: After Workout Meal
scene: 运动一天后，你和球友去吃健康餐。（对话链：运动）

turns.cn: 今天运动量够大，吃什么？
turns.en: Big day. What are we eating?

turns.cn: 沙拉加鸡胸肉吧，我请客。
turns.en: Salad and grilled chicken. My treat.
Same time Saturday?
Yes. Ten AM, same court.
See you next week.
See you then.
